problem id: 8785d0c3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  11001011 -> 10010100
  11010010 -> 00100100
  00010110 -> 00100000
  10111100 -> 01001000
  01100011 -> 00000110
  10001111 -> 00011000
  10000010 -> 00000000
  10100010 -> 00000000

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 00000000
